name: ASUS ROG CROSSHAIR X870E HERO ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8200+(OC) - 5x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - Realtek 5Gb LAN - Optical S/PDIF out - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: ASUS ROG CROSSHAIR X870E HERO ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe
description: Premium ROG gaming ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with dual PCIe 5.0, dual LAN, and WiFi 7.
